overall.description: First-person perspective footage from a high-quality horror/survival video game. The player walks through a dark rural farmyard at night toward a wooden log cabin, crossing a wooden bridge. Atmospheric low lighting with a distant light source visible near the cabin entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark rural farmyard with wooden swing set

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a dirt path toward a distant light source near a wooden cabin

entered.detail: A-frame wooden swing structure with a single seat, positioned on the left side of the yard
Dark wooden cabin with sloped roof, partially obscured by darkness
Low stone retaining wall running parallel to the path on the left side
Pale blue-white light source glowing near the cabin entrance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a wide, dark farmyard at night. A wooden swing set stands to the left while a log cabin looms ahead in the distance. The camera moves forward along a dirt path toward a mysterious light source near the cabin, with a stone wall visible on the left perimeter.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrowing approach to wooden cabin entrance ramp

agents.ego_description: continuing forward as the path narrows toward a wooden ramp structure leading to the cabin

entered.detail: Wooden plank ramp or bridge leading up to the cabin entrance with log railings
Vertical wooden posts marking the right boundary of the approach path

segments.scene_description: The swing set passes out of view behind the camera as the path narrows toward a wooden bridge structure. The stone wall on the left draws closer while the log cabin shifts to the left side of the frame. The camera approaches the wooden ramp leading up to the cabin entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden ramp with railings leading to cabin entrance

agents.ego_description: walking up the wooden ramp toward the cabin entrance, approaching the glowing light source

segments.scene_description: The camera moves onto the wooden bridge ramp, ascending toward the cabin entrance. The stone wall and fence posts fall behind as the wooden railings of the bridge come into close view on both sides. The mysterious light source grows larger and brighter directly ahead as the player approaches the cabin threshold.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement through a dark, rural farmyard that culminates in an approach to a dimly lit log cabin. It begins on a wide dirt path with a wooden swing set to the left and a stone wall marking the perimeter, moving steadily toward a distant, mysterious light. As the camera advances, the path narrows and the swing set recedes from view, shifting the cabin to the left of the frame while the stone wall draws closer. The scene then transitions onto a wooden bridge ramp, ascending toward the cabin entrance as the railings come into close view on both sides. Finally, the stone wall and fence posts fall behind while the light source grows larger and brighter, leading the camera directly to the cabin threshold.
